---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement for tg-tui
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected?

## Proposal

Describe the feature or change you would like.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about (if any).

## Scope notes

tg-tui v1 is a **daily-driver** terminal client (auth, dialogs, read/send, reply/edit/delete, mute/pin, drafts, smart inline media). Explicit non-goals for v1 include multi-account, chat folders UI, global message search, voice/video calls, and bot-only mode. Call out if your request is intentionally post-v1.
